final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat Official Account article cover image for a fragrance new-product launch titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: premium editorial banner, high-end luxury aesthetic
Composition: centered composition, headline text as the dominant visual anchor
Subject: fragrance new-product launch "染秋香氛新品发布", with the title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" prominently displayed
Scene/backdrop: autumnal atmosphere evoking dyed foliage and lingering fragrance
Lighting/mood: warm, soft, refined — evoking autumn light and sensory elegance
Color palette: deep amber, burnt sienna, muted gold, and warm ivory tones
Materials/textures: smooth paper or fabric texture with subtle depth, no harsh gradients
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be the visual focal point; layout optimized for 900×500 horizontal banner ratio
Avoid: cluttered layout, generic stock-photo autumn clichés, cold or desaturated tones, overly decorative fonts that reduce legibility
